description: Learn the art of stir-frying, including ingredient preparation, heat control, and cooking methods.

steps.instruction: Prepare all ingredients by cutting them into uniform sizes for even cooking.
Heat the wok or pan until it's very hot before adding oil.
Add the ingredients in the order of cooking time, starting with proteins and then vegetables.
Stir constantly to prevent burning and ensure even cooking.
Add sauces or seasonings towards the end of cooking.
